hero.description: We create, manage, and optimize Google Ads campaigns that help your business attract qualified leads, increase visibility, and grow online.

benefits.description: Google Ads helps your business reach people who are actively searching for your products or services and turn that interest into valuable leads.

leads.title: Qualified Leads
leads.description: Reach people who are genuinely interested in your services and ready to take action.

results.title: Fast Results
results.description: Start generating traffic and leads within days instead of waiting months.

budget.title: Budget Control
budget.description: Decide how much you want to spend and scale campaigns when they perform.

analytics.title: Clear Analytics
analytics.description: Track calls, forms, leads, and campaign performance with precision.

targeting.title: Precise Targeting
targeting.description: Show ads only to people searching for your products or services.

growth.title: Business Growth
growth.description: Build a consistent source of leads and support long-term business growth.

services.description: We create and manage different types of Google Ads campaigns based on your business goals, industry, and target audience.

search.title: Search Ads
search.description: Appear at the top of Google search results when potential customers are actively looking for your services.

local.title: Local Ads
local.description: Reach customers in your city or service area and increase local business visibility.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce Ads
ecommerce.description: Promote products through Google Shopping and Performance Max campaigns.

remarketing.title: Remarketing
remarketing.description: Reconnect with visitors who have already interacted with your website but haven't converted yet.

process.description: Our structured approach helps ensure your Google Ads campaigns are built on data, optimized for performance, and focused on generating qualified leads.

step1.title: Business Analysis
step1.description: We learn about your business, goals, competitors, and target audience to create the right advertising strategy.

step2.title: Keyword Research
step2.description: We identify high-intent search terms that potential customers use when looking for your products or services.

step3.title: Campaign Setup
step3.description: We build campaigns, create ad groups, write ad copy, and configure all necessary campaign settings.

step4.title: Conversion Tracking
step4.description: We set up analytics and conversion tracking to measure calls, form submissions, and other important actions.

step5.title: Optimization & Reporting
step5.description: We continuously improve campaign performance and provide transparent reports on results.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about Google Ads campaigns, budgets, lead generation, and campaign management.

item1.question: How much should I spend on Google Ads?
item1.answer: The ideal budget depends on your industry, competition, and goals. We help determine a realistic budget that aligns with your business objectives.

item2.question: How quickly can I see results?
item2.answer: Most campaigns start generating impressions and clicks within a few days. Lead generation results often become visible within the first weeks after launch.

item3.question: Do I need a website before running Google Ads?
item3.answer: In most cases, yes. A professional and conversion-focused website helps turn visitors into qualified leads and improves campaign performance.

item4.question: Can Google Ads work for local businesses?
item4.answer: Absolutely. Google Ads is highly effective for local businesses by targeting people searching for services in specific cities or regions.

item5.question: Do you provide campaign reports?
item5.answer: Yes. We provide transparent reports and explain key metrics such as clicks, leads, conversions, and campaign performance.

item6.question: Can I stop my campaigns at any time?
item6.answer: Yes. You remain in full control of your advertising budget and campaigns, and they can be paused or adjusted whenever needed.
